div.div:
① Flujo principal:
Usuario → Frontend → Chatbot → Tools → Datos/ML/LightRAG → Respuesta al usuario

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1070px; margin-left: 433px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② DATA alimenta ML:
master_cl (features) → training_pipeline → modelo
master_cl (features) → serving_pipeline → predicciones

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1070px; margin-left: 833px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
③ ML alimenta GENAI:
predicciones → Tool 2 (propension_lookup) → respuesta al usuario

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1145px; margin-left: 33px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
④ GCS es compartido:
· files/ (PDFs) ← ingestados por Light RAG
· data/ (predicciones) ← exportadas por data-to-bucket

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1145px; margin-left: 433px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑤ Capa 3 compartidos (los consumís):
· GenAI Gateway: lo invoca el LangGraph agent
· Light RAG: lo invoca tool 1 (document_search)
· Dataform: lo usa BQO internamente

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 368px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1145px; margin-left: 833px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⑥ Flechas:
· Sólidas = flujo de datos (entrada/salida)
· Punteadas = invocación/relación lógica

div.div: Si entendés: qué hace cada caja, qué fluye entre cajas, quién es tuyo (Capa 2) vs compartido (Capa 3), y por qué se conectan así... entonces entendés Cosmos.
